Our process
From first sketch to permit-ready drawings — a design-only path that keeps you free to choose your own builder when the time comes.
01

Discovery

Site walk, program, budget, and vision — the constraints that shape everything after.

02

Concept

Massing, siting, and early material direction, tested against the site and the light.

03

Design Development

Plans, elevations, and finishes refined into a coherent, buildable design.

04

Entitlement Set

Permit-ready drawings, stamped by your architect of record, ready for bid or build.

Let's talk about your project
Based in the Sierra Nevada, working across Martis Camp, Lahontan, Clear Creek Tahoe, Schaffer's Mill, and the Northern California coast.
